title: TUI /cat: std::fs::read blocks tokio event loop
description: tui/src/event.rs handle_slash 'cat' arm calls std::fs::read(path) synchronously on a tokio worker thread. Reading a slow file (NFS, FUSE) blocks the event loop. Same consequence as /\! blocking: relay events stall during the read. Fix: use tokio::fs::read or spawn_blocking.
